name: shamela
description: Search Maktabah al-Shamela 4 from Claude. Requires Shamela 4 installed locally.
long_description: Lets Claude search the Arabic Islamic library Maktabah al-Shamela 4 installed on your computer. Returns book pages, book metadata, and author biographies with printed-page references and matched-text context. Reads Shamela's local Lucene index and SQLite catalogs read-only; nothing is sent over the network.

shamela_install_folder.title: Shamela installation folder
shamela_install_folder.description: The folder where you installed Shamela 4 (contains 'database' and 'app' subfolders). Leave empty to auto-detect.

jre_path.title: Java executable (advanced)
jre_path.description: Path to a Java executable. Leave empty to use the JRE bundled with your Shamela install.

tools.name: shamela_search_pages
tools.description: Search Maktabah al-Shamela page text for an Arabic phrase. Returns hits with book name, author, printed-page label, and snippet.

tools.name: shamela_search_books
tools.description: Search Shamela's catalog of books by name, author name, or bibliography text. Works even before any books are downloaded.

tools.name: shamela_search_authors
tools.description: Search Shamela's catalog of authors by name or biography text. Returns author with death year and snippet from biography.
